title: Why I Strongly Believe In Howmet Aerospace
text: Howmet Aerospace has become a tremendous success after the 2020 spin-off, allowing it to focus on high-quality aerospace and related industrial parts. While long-haul demand is still weak, short-haul demand and pricing power are resulting in strong EBITDA growth and rapidly improving free cash flow.

title: Howmet (HWM) Shares Increase 11% YTD: What's Driving it?
text: Continued recovery in the commercial aerospace end market, pricing actions and cost-control measures bode well for Howmet (HWM).
